title: Anti Xaero
description: Disables minimap, cave mode and entity radar on clients that use Xaero minimap.
body:
## Disables the unfair features of Xaero minimap
Great for SMPs that want to disable the entity radar from the popular Minimap mod.
The most least bloated plugin that achives this.

_We are not affiliated with Xaero Minimap/Worldmap all credit goes to [thexaero](https://modrinth.com/user/thexaero)._

If you're having any isseus with the plugin feel free to contact me thru my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/YvEzbQxkMx).

_We do not represent or claim to be affiliated with Minecraft, Mojang or Microsoft._
